items.title: Improve app_connectivity
items.rationale: 79% of users experienced issues with app connectivity, which is the most frequently mentioned problem.

items.title: Enhance setup process
items.rationale: 75% of users reported difficulties with setting up the JioTag, which is the second most frequently mentioned issue.

items.title: Address customer_service concerns
items.rationale: 31% of users had negative experiences with customer service, indicating a need for improvement.

items.title: Optimize battery life
items.rationale: 6% of users reported issues with battery life, which is a common problem with Bluetooth trackers.

items.title: Investigate accuracy issues
items.rationale: 40% of users experienced accuracy problems, which may be due to hardware or software issues.
